Manages accelerometer data and implements a factory registry with functions for record management in flash memory.


## Files
- **[accel_manager.c](accel_manager.c.md)**: Manages accelerometer data subscriptions, sampling rates, and dispatches data to subscribers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[factory_registry.c](factory_registry.c.md)**: Implements a factory registry for managing records with functions to add, get, remove, and persist data.
- **[factory_registry.h](factory_registry.h.md)**: Functions for managing a factory settings registry, including initialization, addition, retrieval, and removal of records.
- **[registry_common.h](registry_common.h.md)**: Defines a packed `Record` structure for registry entries with key, value, and UUID attributes.
- **[registry_private.c](registry_private.c.md)**: Implements functions for managing a registry in flash memory, including adding, removing, and reading records.
- **[registry_private.h](registry_private.h.md)**: Private functions and data structures for managing a registry in flash memory.
